mapper.sql: select m.merchant_id, m.application_no, m.account_username, m.account_password, m.query_token_hash, m.company_name, m.company_address, m.contact_name, m.contact_phone, m.business_license, m.product_intro, m.origin_traceability, m.accepts_verification_recruitment, m.accepts_public_welfare, m.protocol_agreed, m.audit_status, m.audit_remark, m.admin_user_id, su.user_name as admin_username, m.status, m.del_flag, m.audit_by, m.audit_time, m.create_by, m.create_time as merchant_create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time as merchant_update_time, m.remark from shop_merchant m left join sys_user su on su.user_id = m.admin_user_id and su.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select:
m.del_flag = '0'
and (m.company_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%') or m.contact_name like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%') or m.contact_phone like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%') or m.account_username like concat('%', #{companyName}, '%'))
and m.audit_status = #{auditStatus} and m.status = #{status}
order by case when m.audit_status = 'PENDING' then 0 else 1 end, m.merchant_id desc

select log_id, merchant_id, action, from_status, to_status, audit_remark, operator_type, operator_id, operator_name, create_time from shop_merchant_audit_log where merchant_id = #{merchantId} order by log_id desc
select role_id from sys_role where role_key = #{roleKey} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into shop_merchant (application_no, account_username, account_password, query_token_hash, company_name, company_address, contact_name, contact_phone, business_license, product_intro, origin_traceability, accepts_verification_recruitment, accepts_public_welfare, protocol_agreed, audit_status, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{applicationNo}, #{accountUsername}, #{accountPassword}, #{queryTokenHash}, #{companyName}, #{companyAddress}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{businessLicense}, #{productIntro}, #{originTraceability}, #{acceptsVerificationRecruitment}, #{acceptsPublicWelfare}, #{protocolAgreed}, #{auditStatus}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_merchant set account_username = #{accountUsername}, account_password = #{accountPassword}, company_name = #{companyName}, company_address = #{companyAddress}, contact_name = #{contactName}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, business_license = #{businessLicense}, product_intro = #{productIntro}, origin_traceability = #{originTraceability}, accepts_verification_recruitment = #{acceptsVerificationRecruitment}, accepts_public_welfare = #{acceptsPublicWelfare}, protocol_agreed = #{protocolAgreed}, audit_status = 'PENDING', audit_remark = null, audit_by = null, audit_time = null, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where merchant_id = #{merchantId} and audit_status = 'REJECTED' and del_flag = '0'

update shop_merchant set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, admin_user_id = #{adminUserId}, account_password = case when #{auditStatus} = 'APPROVED' then null else account_password end, audit_by = #{auditBy}, audit_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{auditBy}, update_time = sysdate() where merchant_id = #{merchantId} and audit_status = 'PENDING' and del_flag = '0'
update shop_merchant set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where merchant_id = #{merchantId} and audit_status = 'APPROVED' and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into shop_merchant_audit_log (merchant_id, action, from_status, to_status, audit_remark, operator_type, operator_id, operator_name, create_time) values (#{merchantId}, #{action}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{auditRemark}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, sysdate())
